_comment: Cortex Code event hooks. SessionStart injects Snowflake context awareness; Stop writes a session summary to the report bus. Both are best-effort (fail silently if ml_utils/snowflake_utils are not yet in src/). The Claude Code plugin-lifecycle hooks (after-init, before-deploy, after-evaluation) referenced in agent frontmatter have no equivalent in Cortex Code — see AGENTS.md 'Cortex Code Orchestration' section for the team-based alternative pattern.
